---
title: "Research"
format:
  html:
    respect-user-color-scheme: true
---

## Work in Progress

### Price of Productivity

*with [Gabriel Ahlfeldt](https://www.ahlfeldt.com){target="_blank"}, Stephan Heblich & Tobias Seidel* &ensp;|&ensp; [[Discussion Paper]](https://github.com/Ahlfeldt/DPs/blob/main/GA_SH_TS_FY_-_Productivity.pdf){target="_blank"}

*We construct a new micro-geographic commercial rent index for Germany to study the capitalization of agglomeration economies into floor space prices. In large local labor markets, commercial rents decline by \hl{\largellmGradient}\% per kilometer from the central business district, compared to 13\% for residential rents, reflecting stronger agglomeration benefits at the center. Commercial rents in central business districts increase with local labor market size at an elasticity of 15\%, implying that wage responses capture only about half of the agglomeration effect on total factor productivity.*
